---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for darkman-x
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or gap.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Scope check**
Does this fit the existing `PROVIDERS` matrix / non-goals in `RECREATION-PROMPT.md`? (No SaaS backend, no telemetry, no new caveman voice, etc.)
